body.title: Stamp produced_by at every emission chokepoint (memory_emit, cc_queue, proof_emitter, skills)
body.description:
intention: I intend that every NEW store artifact carries its backward edge at emission time.

Per T-feedback-edge-design's schema: add produced_by to every emission chokepoint. Chokepoints: devlab/claudecode/memory_emit.py (accept + stamp produced_by), devlab/claudecode/cc_queue.py add-path (tickets inherit decision_id-derived produced_by), proof emitter, and skill instruction files that emit (skills/sorted/, skills/note/, skills/ticket/, skills/outcome/) updated to pass it. Additive field — no reader may require it (old artifacts lack it).

**Affected files:** devlab/claudecode/memory_emit.py, devlab/claudecode/cc_queue.py, proof emitter module (path per repo), skills/sorted/SKILL.md, skills/note/SKILL.md, skills/ticket/SKILL.md, skills/outcome/SKILL.md

**Design rules:** canonical store one home; additive envelope change (no new artifact type)

**Scope boundary:** stamping only — NO dispatch logic (that is T-escalation-dispatch-producer-review); no backfill of old artifacts.

**Test plan:** hermetic test emits a decision+ticket into a tmp store root and asserts produced_by present and correctly valued; old-artifact read-path regression test (reader tolerates absence). Cleanup: tests write only to tmp store root (monkeypatched); nothing to clean in the real store.

**Completion criteria:** a decision emitted via memory_emit.py and a ticket added via cc_queue.py both carry produced_by in their stored JSON; readers unchanged pass on produced_by-less legacy files.

**Validation:** emit a real decision post-ship and grep its JSON for produced_by. Observable via: log.info("emit ... produced_by=...") in memory_emit.py.

**Rollback:** git revert of this ticket's commit — field is additive, no reader requires it.

audit-emphasis: none

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: produced_by stamped at all 3 chokepoints: memory_emit.emit (param + session:<emitter> default + --produced-by CLI), ticket_store._envelope (derives from decision_id, else session), proof_emitter (passes proven ticket). Additive top-level field — legacy artifacts without it still read (regression test). Envelope schema-pin test updated. /sorted skill gains --produced-by for the richer intent: producer; /ticket + /note get correct edges automatically via the chokepoint (no skill change needed). Proof red=AssertionError green=passed @670b06fd (the proof itself now carries produced_by=T-produced-by-emission-sweep); 5 tests + 49 in affected suites green. NOTE: memory_emit stays logger-free (boot-light), so the observable is the grep-able JSON field, not a log line. Found+cleaned pre-existing test debris: test_proof_emitter.py leaks fixture proofs into the real store (no UU_MEMORY_ROOT monkeypatch) — filing a follow-up.
body.intention: I intend that every NEW store artifact carries its backward edge (produced_by) at emission time.
